The '''sunnydew flower''' was a [[Glowing nectar|nectar]]-producing [[Plant/Legends|plant]] native to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The flowers were indigenous to Endor's [[Zandor]] region, and its nectar was known for its medicinal properties that kept the rest of Zandor's flora flourishing. The rampaging [[Ogre]] [[Gantu]] eventually destroyed all of Zandor's sunnydew flowers, rendering Zandor a wasteland—however, the [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]] and [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]] eventually chased Gantu off, leading to a regrowth in sunnydew flowers that promised to spread across Zandor.<ref name="Ewoks 1" />
